static_proof.notes: deploy.yml gate-env patch only — SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED=true added

queries.description: pick_candidates row count and latest activity
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, MAX(updated_at) AS latest_update FROM pick_candidates

queries.description: board scan activity post-deploy (is_board_candidate rows updated)
queries.sql: SELECT MAX(updated_at), MIN(updated_at), COUNT(*) FROM pick_candidates WHERE is_board_candidate = true
SELECT MAX(updated_at) FROM pick_candidates WHERE model_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, MAX(created_at) AS latest FROM syndicate_board
SELECT COUNT(*) AS rows_refreshed_today FROM market_universe WHERE refreshed_at > '2026-06-07T00:00:00Z'

workflow_fix.change: Added SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED=true to production env heredoc
workflow_fix.root_cause: SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED was never set in any deploy.yml commit; board scan ran with enabled:false — zero candidates — zero scoring — zero board

sha_binding.note: Merge SHA — PR #985 squash-merged to main 2026-06-07
